detectors.description:
Reentrancy in DeidaraInu._transfer(address,address,uint256) (DeidaraInu.sol#379-411):
	External calls:
	- _swapTokensForEth(balanceOf(address(this))) (DeidaraInu.sol#395)
		- _router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (DeidaraInu.sol#425)
	External calls sending eth:
	- _sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (DeidaraInu.sol#401)
		- _taxWallet.transfer(amount) (DeidaraInu.sol#433)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (DeidaraInu.sol#409)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (DeidaraInu.sol#495)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (DeidaraInu.sol#475)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (DeidaraInu.sol#477)
	DeidaraInu._rOwned (DeidaraInu.sol#159) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DeidaraInu._takeTeam(uint256) (DeidaraInu.sol#489-497)
	- DeidaraInu._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (DeidaraInu.sol#471-485)
	- DeidaraInu.balanceOf(address) (DeidaraInu.sol#261-265)
	- DeidaraInu.constructor() (DeidaraInu.sol#213-225)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (DeidaraInu.sol#409)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (DeidaraInu.sol#503)
	DeidaraInu._rTotal (DeidaraInu.sol#169) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DeidaraInu._getCurrentSupply() (DeidaraInu.sol#601-611)
	- DeidaraInu._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (DeidaraInu.sol#501-507)
	- DeidaraInu.constructor() (DeidaraInu.sol#213-225)
	- DeidaraInu.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (DeidaraInu.sol#353-361)
